description: Technical documentation artifacts supporting MDR/IVDR cybersecurity expectations.

name: AI Act High-Risk Health AI Evidence Pack

name: UK Clinical Safety Case Evidence Pack
description: Clinical safety case artifacts aligned to DCB0129/DCB0160 safety governance expectations.

name: DICOMweb Incident Response Evidence Annex
description: Incident evidence package for imaging API enumeration, metadata leakage, and unauthorized retrieval scenarios.
artifacts: DICOMweb API query/retrieve logs with principal attribution
Imaging export destination and volume monitoring outputs
Metadata minimization and de-identification validation evidence

name: IoMT Command and Device Integrity Evidence Annex
description: Evidence bundle for networked device command injection, ransomware lateral movement, and control-plane integrity incidents.
artifacts: Device command provenance and authorization logs
Biomedical network segmentation validation and exception logs
Clinical safety fallback activation and verification records

name: Transaction Integrity and Fraud Response Evidence Annex
description: Evidence package for prescription replay, claims tampering, and healthcare transaction integrity threats.
artifacts: NCPDP transaction replay-prevention and prescriber verification records
X12 transformation integrity checks and reconciliation outputs
Clearinghouse partner trust and incident communication records
Fraud/anomaly detection tuning and alert investigation evidence

name: Remote Monitoring Telemetry Integrity Evidence Annex
description: Evidence pack for remote patient monitoring identity spoofing and falsified telemetry events.
artifacts: Clinical plausibility and override review records
Patient safety communication and escalation logs
